data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Substitution history tracking', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of a substitution history tracking system. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as the necessary tracking mechanism is not validated or evidenced in the current state.
gaps: No evidence of a substitution history tracking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
